original_image_tags: A stylized black-and-white logo featuring a sharp, angular shape resembling a boomerang or delta wing intersecting a textured sphere, set against a plain background.

elements.description: A stylized, black and white illustration of a flying saucer, featuring a dark, elongated oval shape over a circular, patterned disk. It is positioned in the upper-center area of the page, between the letterhead and the typed address.

judge.reason: Description A describes a boomerang/delta wing intersecting a sphere, while Description B describes a flying saucer with an oval over a disk; these are clearly different visual objects.
